channel.title: Sanesecurity-Blog on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Sanesecurity-Blog on smpaget blog

item.title: Email Spam
item.description: I have been receiving a lot of email spam recently. I wonder if my filters have been changed at web domains? The thing I have noticed about this spam is it almost convincing. This Fedex email look very convincing. The old chestnut of don’t open an attachment on a email your not expecting kept me from opening it but i did have an urge to open it. MXlab warning on this email the lloydstsb email was slightly less convincing as TSb has been spun off into its own bank, I was pretty sure that the email as fake, but still I did wonder. the sane security blog warning on this email These professional looking emails made me consider why they were so close to being accurate and why others were so bad. I remembered this…
